understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate the level by moving the currently selected piece around the 3-pixel-per-cell grid (and switching between multiple selectable pieces when needed) to ultimately reach the goal tile(s) within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action attempts to shift the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; movement can fail if blocked by walls or other objects, though the blocked hint is only heuristic. If a pushable block is immediately adjacent in the move direction, the move can push it along as the selected piece advances, provided the space beyond is free/allowed. Walls/boundaries prevent movement in various ways and must be learned by interaction. Multiple selectable pieces can exist; using CLICK with an exact object position switches control to the selectable at that coordinate without moving it via grid-step movement.
